bead.title: Classify and supersede legacy CLI/autopilot governing artifacts
bead.description: Review legacy self-governing artifacts that still define HELIX as a CLI/autopilot/DDx control system: FEAT-001, FEAT-002, FEAT-011, ADR-001, SD-001, TD-002, TD-011, TP-002, architecture, implementation-plan. For each artifact, record one classification: survives in runtime-neutral core, moves to DDx integration, historical/superseded, or retired. Update or create follow-on beads for the chosen disposition.
bead.acceptance: A classification table exists in docs/helix or an alignment report; every legacy CLI/autopilot artifact has a disposition; artifacts that remain normative no longer contradict helix.prd; DDx-only artifacts are clearly scoped as integration docs.
